description_long: This object is a compact fax machine with a rectangular beige body and a simple, utilitarian design. The front features a wide black output slot with a tray extending outward to catch printed or faxed documents. On top, a gray paper input tray is angled backward, capable of holding a small stack of paper. The surface is mostly smooth with minimal visible controls, and there are a few small buttons or indicators on the top left. The back is flat and unadorned except for the continuation of the input tray. No numeric keypad or telephone handset is visible, suggesting a basic model focused on document transmission.
description: A beige, rectangular fax machine with a top-loading paper tray and a front output slot, featuring minimal controls and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black output slot and tray, with the paper input tray visible at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled paper input tray and the extended output tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back and the top of the input tray, with no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the paper trays' alignment and the overall boxy shape.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small cluster of buttons or indicators is located on the top left surface, with no visible display screen or grouped control panel.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the top rear, angled backward, and appears to hold a small stack of paper; no adjustable guides or covers are visible.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front lower center of the main body, with a black tray extending outward to catch paper.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is present or visibly attached to the object.
